title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama: chat, embeddings, tool-calling and structured output with any LangChain chain or agent.

title: ollama-webui (formerly Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama: markdown, code highlighting, model manager, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint proxy.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, model management, Spring Boot starter available.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and shell completions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation stack using Ollama + Chroma; ingest PDFs, ask questions in CLI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; slash commands, thread support, rate limiting.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama server, CLI and curated model derivations for reproducible deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC caching and ingress.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models, streaming chat, and dependency-injection friendly SDK.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama; tokio-based, serde-powered, covers chat, generate, embeddings and model ops.

title: ollama-php
summary: Community PHP SDK for Ollama; PSR-18 HTTP client, Laravel service provider, streaming responses via generators.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models; supports themes, code blocks, export to markdown.

title: ollama-github-action
summary: GitHub Action that installs Ollama, pre-pulls selected models and exposes them to your workflow jobs.

title: ollama-models-registry
summary: Community-curated registry of ready-to-use Ollama Modelfiles with performance notes and hardware requirements.
